records.question: Which campuses located in Turlock where the county is Stanislaus were established in 1957 and had exactly 395 undergraduate and at most 56 graduate enrollments in 2004, with campus fees of at least 1915 in or before 1996?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT campuses.id FROM campuses
JOIN csu_fees ON campuses.id = csu_fees.campus
JOIN discipline_enrollments ON campuses.id = discipline_enrollments.campus
WHERE discipline_enrollments.graduate <= 56 AND campuses.location = 'Turlock' AND discipline_enrollments.undergraduate = 395 AND discipline_enrollments.year = 2004 AND campuses.year = 1957 AND csu_fees.year <= 1996 AND campuses.county = 'Stanislaus' AND csu_fees.campusfee >= 1915
records.pred_sql:
SELECT c."Id"
FROM "Campuses" c
LEFT JOIN "csu_fees" f ON c."Id" = f."Campus"
LEFT JOIN "discipline_enrollments" de ON c."Id" = de."Campus"
WHERE c."Location" = 'Turlock'
  AND c."County" = 'Stanislaus'
  AND c."Year" = 1957
  AND de."Year" = 2004
  AND de."Undergraduate" = 395
  AND de."Graduate" <= 56
  AND f."Year" <= 1996
  AND f."CampusFee" >= 1915

records.question: Which campuses exactly named California State University-Channel Islands are located in Camarillo?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT campuses.id FROM campuses
WHERE campuses.campus = 'California State University-Channel Islands' AND campuses.location = 'Camarillo'
records.pred_sql: SELECT "Id" FROM "Campuses" WHERE "Campus" = 'California State University-Channel Islands' AND "Location" = 'Camarillo'

records.question: Which campuses have related csu_fees, degrees, and enrollments records, and have enrollments with a total enrollment in the academic year exactly equal to 704?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT campuses.id FROM campuses
JOIN csu_fees ON campuses.id = csu_fees.campus
JOIN degrees ON campuses.id = degrees.campus
JOIN enrollments ON campuses.id = enrollments.campus
WHERE enrollments.totalenrollment_ay = 704
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.Id
FROM Campuses c
INNER JOIN csu_fees cf ON c.Id = cf.Campus
INNER JOIN degrees d ON c.Id = d.Campus
INNER JOIN enrollments e ON c.Id = e.Campus
WHERE e.TotalEnrollment_AY = 704

records.question: What campuses had exactly 4228 degrees awarded and enrollments with an FTE of 6234 in the year 1959 or earlier?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT campuses.id FROM campuses
JOIN degrees ON campuses.id = degrees.campus
JOIN enrollments ON campuses.id = enrollments.campus
WHERE enrollments.year <= 1959 AND enrollments.fte_ay = 6234 AND degrees.degrees = 4228
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c."Id"
FROM "Campuses" c
INNER JOIN "degrees" d ON c."Id" = d."Campus"
INNER JOIN "enrollments" e ON c."Id" = e."Campus" AND d."Year" = e."Year"
WHERE d."Degrees" = 4228
AND e."FTE_AY" = 6234
AND d."Year" <= 1959

records.question: Which campuses named California State University-Dominguez Hills, established in 1960 in Carson where the county is Los Angeles, had discipline enrollment in discipline 11 exactly in 2004?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT campuses.id FROM campuses
JOIN discipline_enrollments ON campuses.id = discipline_enrollments.campus
WHERE campuses.campus = 'California State University-Dominguez Hills' AND campuses.year = 1960 AND campuses.county = 'Los Angeles' AND campuses.location = 'Carson' AND discipline_enrollments.year = 2004 AND discipline_enrollments.discipline = 11
records.pred_sql:
SELECT c.Id
FROM Campuses c
LEFT JOIN discipline_enrollments de ON c.Id = de.Campus
WHERE c.Campus = 'California State University-Dominguez Hills'
AND c.Year = 1960
AND c.Location = 'Carson'
AND c.County = 'Los Angeles'
AND de.Discipline = 11
AND de.Year = 2004

SELECT campuses.id FROM campuses

WHERE campuses.county = 'Los Angeles'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c."Id"
FROM "Campuses" c

records.question: Which campuses named California State University-Fullerton are located in Orange county and were established in 1957 or later?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT campuses.id FROM campuses
WHERE campuses.county = 'Orange' AND campuses.year >= 1957 AND campuses.campus = 'California State University-Fullerton'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT "Id"
FROM "Campuses"
WHERE "Campus" = 'California State University-Fullerton'
AND "County" = 'Orange'
AND "Year" >= 1957

records.question: Which campuses had enrollments exactly in 1946 and CSU fees from 1996 or later?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT campuses.id FROM campuses
JOIN csu_fees ON campuses.id = csu_fees.campus
JOIN enrollments ON campuses.id = enrollments.campus
WHERE csu_fees.year >= 1996 AND enrollments.year = 1946
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c."Id"
FROM "Campuses" c
WHERE EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM "enrollments" e
  WHERE e."Campus" = c."Id" AND e."Year" = 1946
)
AND EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM "csu_fees" f
  WHERE f."Campus" = c."Id" AND f."Year" >= 1996
)

records.question: Which campuses located in San Luis Obispo have a year of 1901, total enrollment of at least 16394 but full-time equivalent enrollment of at most 15148, at least 3411 degrees awarded, and fees from the year 1996?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT campuses.id FROM campuses
JOIN csu_fees ON campuses.id = csu_fees.campus
JOIN degrees ON campuses.id = degrees.campus
JOIN enrollments ON campuses.id = enrollments.campus
WHERE campuses.year = 1901 AND enrollments.totalenrollment_ay >= 16394 AND degrees.degrees >= 3411 AND enrollments.fte_ay <= 15148 AND campuses.location = 'San Luis Obispo' AND csu_fees.year = 1996
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c."Id"
FROM "Campuses" c
JOIN "enrollments" e ON c."Id" = e."Campus"
JOIN "degrees" d ON c."Id" = d."Campus"
JOIN "csu_fees" f ON c."Id" = f."Campus"
WHERE c."Location" = 'San Luis Obispo'
AND c."Year" = 1901
AND e."TotalEnrollment_AY" >= 16394
AND e."FTE_AY" <= 15148
AND d."Degrees" >= 3411
AND f."Year" = 1996

records.question: Which campuses in Los Angeles county have the name Long Beach State University and offer degrees with at most 4593 awarded?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT campuses.id FROM campuses
JOIN degrees ON campuses.id = degrees.campus
WHERE campuses.county = 'Los Angeles' AND campuses.campus = 'Long Beach State University' AND degrees.degrees <= 4593
records.pred_sql:
SELECT c."Id"
FROM "Campuses" c
JOIN "degrees" d ON c."Id" = d."Campus"
WHERE c."County" = 'Los Angeles'
AND c."Campus" = 'Long Beach State University'
AND d."Degrees" <= 4593
